description: Composition Black knitted Sweater made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed mock neck with a detachable hoodie, zippered front placket, mock button flaps on the upper chest, insert pockets with buttoned closures on the waist, brand tab on the upper left chest button flap and a ribbed hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak, wring or twist Flat dry in shade Fold and stack to maintain shape Moderate warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The mock button flaps and detachable hoodie adds urban styling to this knitted jacket from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with shirts or t-shirts, jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 19"
